name: editUserStarSubscription
description: Allows the bot to cancel or re-enable extension of a subscription paid in Telegram Stars

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the user whose subscription will be edited

parameters.name: telegram_payment_charge_id
parameters.description: Telegram payment identifier for the subscription

parameters.name: is_canceled
parameters.description: Pass True to cancel extension of the user subscription; the subscription must be active up to the end of the current subscription period. Pass False to allow the user to re-enable a subscription that was previously canceled by the bot.
